building-materials.title: Ultratech PPC Cement - 50 Kg
building-materials.description: PPC Cements are great for masonry works as it offers better workability due to its finer particles and pozzolanic properties. Often more cost-effective than OPC because it incorporates supplementary materials like fly ash or slag. While it may have slightly lower initial strength, PPC tends to develop strength over time and often matches or exceeds OPC's strength in the longer term. • Superior strength • Smooth finish • High durability • Low permeability
building-materials.description_html:

• High durability

• Low permeability

all_products.description: PPC Cements are great for masonry works as it offers better workability due to its finer particles and pozzolanic properties. Often more cost-effective than OPC because it incorporates supplementary materials like fly ash or slag. all_products.title: Dr.Fixit 101 Pidiroof LW+ Waterproofing Liquid
all_products.description: Dr. Fixit Pidiroof LW+ is a high-quality integral waterproofing liquid designed to be added to concrete, mortar, and plaster mixes. It improves workability, reduces permeability, and enhances resistance against water seepage and dampness.Ideal for use in roofs, terraces, bathrooms, water tanks, basements, and masonry works, Pidiroof LW+ helps prevent cracks and leakage while increasing the durability of construction. all_products.title: Dr.Fixit 301 - Pidicrete URP Waterproofing Compound
all_products.description: Dr. Fixit Pidicrete URP is a ready-to-use polymer-modified waterproofing repair compound designed for urgent and small-scale repair works. Suitable for residential and commercial maintenance tasks, it ensures quick, reliable, and long-lasting results. • Waterproofing compound • Polymer modified • Strong bonding • Crack repair • Quick application
